title: Delicate Herbal American Freekeh Bowl
description: A crisp and refreshing solo dinner dish featuring freekeh, poached chicken, and herbal flavors, all within a keto-friendly framework.
instructions: Rinse the freekeh in a fine mesh sieve and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil, then add the freekeh, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
While the freekeh cooks, fill a large saucepan with water, bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to a simmer.
Poach the chicken breast in the simmering water for 15-20 minutes, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees.
Remove the chicken from the water, let it rest for a few minutes, then slice it into thin strips.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Fluff the cooked freekeh with a fork and stir in the chopped parsley and dill.
To assemble the bowl, place the cooked freekeh on the bottom, top with sliced chicken, and drizzle with the lemon juice mixture.
